enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his failing HP laptop (daily crashes, broken USBs, memory errors) and explains why he's been absent from vlogging — he's been obsessively working on his website. He describes redesigning the site multiple times, his 'time no object' attitude toward the project, and briefly mentions seeing Edge of Tomorrow and needing to bike to work.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Willing to take as long as needed, even years, because the end result will be worth it
Building it wrong first is sometimes necessary to figure out the right approach
Frustrated but managing with workarounds until he can use a backup computer

claims.subject: Kyle's computer
claims.claim: My computer crashes on a regular basis now.

claims.subject: Kyle's computer
claims.claim: It completely crashes and has to restart, often showing a blue screen.

claims.subject: Kyle's computer
claims.claim: After restarting, it has a memory catastrophe but works for a couple of hours before needing another restart.

claims.subject: Kyle's computer
claims.claim: The problem gets worse every day.

claims.subject: Kyle's computer
claims.claim: I have System Mechanic, Spybot, Malware, and Norton installed, but the computer is still messed up.

claims.subject: Kyle's USBs
claims.claim: Both of my USBs broke, and my keyboard stopped working after a couple of months.

claims.subject: Kyle's USBs
claims.claim: Luckily, one USB still works, but if that fails, I won't be able to use the computer anymore.

claims.subject: Kyle's backup computer
claims.claim: I have a backup computer, but I'm not sure if it works.

claims.subject: Kyle's vlogs
claims.claim: I haven't been doing many vlogs because I've been too busy working on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle's weekend
claims.claim: This weekend, I went to the movies with my mom and saw 'Edge of Tomorrow' in 3D.

claims.subject: Kyle's work
claims.claim: Yesterday, I worked from dawn till dusk.

claims.subject: Kyle's website
claims.claim: I got my website to a pretty cool place and am excited to see where it's going.

claims.subject: Kyle's work schedule
claims.claim: I have to ride 12 miles to my first job today.

claims.subject: Kyle's bike
claims.claim: I at least put oil on my bike, but I'm not sure if I want to test it tonight.

claims.subject: Kyle's YouTube comments
claims.claim: I haven't looked at my YouTube comments in the last few days because I felt behind.

claims.subject: Kyle's website development
claims.claim: Sometimes I design something, but the original design turns out to be flawed, requiring rework.

claims.subject: Kyle's website development
claims.claim: Reworking the design is a bummer, but it means the page is more complicated and better in the end.

claims.subject: Kyle's website development
claims.claim: The goal is to figure out the right way to build it as early as possible.

claims.subject: Kyle's website development
claims.claim: Originally, I had the website based on Watson, but now it's based on speed.

claims.subject: Kyle's website development
claims.claim: The website might end up being even bigger than I realized, possibly delaying it another month.

claims.subject: Kyle's dedication
claims.claim: I have a 'time no object' attitude toward my website, meaning I'll take as long as needed to make it awesome.

claims.subject: Kyle's computer
claims.claim: Now my computer won't even start, and I don't know what's going on.

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder Vlog. This is, I don't know what day it is. My computer is like so sick, dude. My computer, like, it completely does these crashes, completely crashes like on a regular basis now.

I have to completely restart the computer and it has to do one of these things. Well, actually a different one of these. Last time it was a different one of these. Now it's the blue screen thing. Every single day.

I have to restart the computer and then it like has memory catastrophe. Here's what normally happens. Memory catastrophe. And then I'm good for like, I don't know, a couple hours and then I have to restart the computer. And it's like gets worse every day. I don't know what's going on.

Uh, I have, I have, uh, System Mechanic, Spybot, Malware, Norton. It's just a fucked up computer, I guess. Like, my, uh, my USB, both of my USBs here broke. This keyboard stopped working after a couple months after I bought it. It's an HP.

Luckily, luckily, this USB still is one last holdout that still works. But when that goes, I can't use a computer anymore. Or get it fixed. I don't know. But luckily I have a backup computer. Hopefully that works. I don't really, I'm not that familiar with it.

So, uh, anyways, babbling. So I haven't been doing a lot of vlogs because, uh, I've been like way too busy on my, uh, website. Like, way too busy. Like, yeah, this weekend was good. All I did was work.

But I did go to the movie. I did go to my mom's house. And then we saw, went to the movie theaters and saw Edge of Tomorrow. Because I like those new 3D movies. And, but that was all. That's all I did this weekend. Yesterday I worked from like dawn till dusk. It's so solid. Um, so yeah. But anyways, I got my page to a pretty cool place. I'm excited to see where it's going to be today when I get home from work.

Um, and, uh, yeah. But I have to work, I have to ride like 12 and a half miles off to my first job today. In the Erie. Um, I have to adjust my front derailleur. At least put oil on it. I don't know if I want to adjust it today. I'm waiting for my oatmeal to cook. What time is it? It's like 6 and I have to leave at 7 to be at work at 8. Um, and, uh, that's about it.

I haven't even looked at my YouTube comments for the last few days. I'm like totally, I'm, I totally. See, cause I got to a point where I felt like I was behind. You know, like it was dragging out too long. Whenever that happens, I double down even more. And I shut everything out. Um, yeah. Cause I, I, the way that I, and that happens when I like design something.

And then it turns out that the original design I had was all fucked up and I have to redo it. And I've had to do that a couple of times, but, but whenever I have to do that, that's, I don't, it does not that matter if you're a bummer, bummer.
Bummer because, um, it just means that it's a more complicated page. You know what I mean? And sometimes you have to build it wrong before you figure out the right way to do it.
The game is to try to figure out the right way to do it the earliest that you can. But, uh, yeah, before I had it based on Watts and now I have it based on speed.
But it's going to be cool, man. But it might end up being even bigger than I even realized now, which could make it drag on another month, but we'll see, whatever.
I don't care because, um, I can dedicate so much of my time, like in the situation I'm in now to work on my website that I have a time, no object attitude.
You know, like how people would have like a price, no object for a car.
They just want to have the nicest car ever. And that's just how I am with the website.
So even if it takes me a couple of years, I still, uh, by the time it does come out, it'll be fucking awesome.
See, look, now my computer won't even start. I don't even know what the fuck's going on.
Oh, cool, the thing's spinning around again.
Alright, so that's that. I'll get going with my day. Peace out.
